org: Rhymes AI / University of Hong Kong
tEn: Aria-UI: Visual Grounding for GUI Instructions
sEn: Aria-UI achieves state-of-the-art GUI grounding via pure vision, scalable data synthesis, and context-aware reasoning.
sZh: Aria-UI通过纯视觉方法、可扩展数据合成和上下文感知推理，在GUI定位任务上达到最先进水平。
absEn: Digital agents for automating tasks across different platforms by directly manipulating the GUIs are increasingly important. For these agents, grounding from language instructions to target elements remains a significant challenge due to reliance on HTML or AXTree inputs. In this paper, we introduce Aria-UI, a large multimodal model specifically designed for GUI grounding. Aria-UI adopts a pure-vision approach, eschewing reliance on auxiliary inputs. To adapt to heterogeneous planning instructions, we propose a scalable data pipeline that synthesizes diverse and high-quality instruction samples for grounding. To handle dynamic contexts in task performing, Aria-UI incorporates textual and text-image interleaved action histories, enabling robust context-aware reasoning for grounding. Aria-UI sets new state-of-the-art results across offline and online agent benchmarks, outperforming both vision-only and AXTree-reliant baselines. We release all training data and model checkpoints to foster further research at https://ariaui.github.io.
absZh: 跨平台直接操作GUI的数字代理日益重要。对于这些代理，从语言指令到目标元素的定位仍是一大挑战，因为现有方法依赖HTML或AXTree输入。本文提出Aria-UI，一种专为GUI定位设计的大型多模态模型。Aria-UI采用纯视觉方法，摒弃辅助输入依赖。为适应异构规划指令，我们提出可扩展数据流水线，合成多样且高质量的定位指令样本。为处理任务执行中的动态上下文，Aria-UI整合文本及图文交错的行动历史，实现鲁棒的上下文感知定位。Aria-UI在离线和在线代理基准上均取得最先进结果，优于纯视觉和依赖AXTree的基线。我们发布所有训练数据和模型检查点，以促进进一步研究，详见https://ariaui.github.io。

contrib.en: Proposes Aria-UI, a pure-vision LMM for GUI grounding without relying on HTML or AXTree inputs.
contrib.zh: 提出Aria-UI，一种纯视觉的大多模态模型，用于GUI定位，不依赖HTML或AXTree输入。

contrib.en: Designs a scalable data pipeline to synthesize diverse, high-quality instruction samples for grounding.
contrib.zh: 设计可扩展的数据管道，合成多样、高质量的指令样本用于定位。

contrib.en: Incorporates textual and text-image interleaved action histories for robust context-aware grounding.
contrib.zh: 融入文本和文本-图像交错动作历史，实现鲁棒的上下文感知定位。

contrib.en: Achieves state-of-the-art results on offline and online agent benchmarks, outperforming vision-only and AXTree-reliant baselines.
contrib.zh: 在离线和在线智能体基准上取得最先进结果，优于纯视觉和依赖AXTree的基线。

contrib.en: Releases all training data and model checkpoints to foster further research.
contrib.zh: 发布所有训练数据和模型检查点，以促进进一步研究。

contrib.en: Demonstrates strong zero-shot generalization across web, desktop, and mobile platforms.
contrib.zh: 在网页、桌面和移动平台上展示出强大的零样本泛化能力。

limits.en: Lacks autonomous planning capability; relies on a separate planner model for task instructions.
limits.zh: 缺乏自主规划能力；依赖独立的规划器模型生成任务指令。

limits.en: Training does not include error correction for planner-generated instructions.
limits.zh: 训练未包含对规划器生成指令的错误纠正。

limits.en: Performance may degrade when planner produces low-quality or incorrect instructions.
limits.zh: 当规划器生成低质量或错误指令时，性能可能下降。

limits.en: Limited to GUI grounding; does not address other aspects of agent tasks like planning or memory.
limits.zh: 仅限于GUI定位；未涉及智能体任务的其他方面，如规划或记忆。

limits.en: Data pipeline relies on strong LMMs (e.g., GPT-4o) for caption generation, which may introduce biases.
limits.zh: 数据管道依赖强大多模态模型（如GPT-4o）生成描述，可能引入偏差。

items.en: Digital agents for automating tasks across different platforms by directly manipulating the GUIs are increasingly important. For these agents, grounding from language instructions to target elements remains a significant challenge due to reliance on HTML or AXTree inputs. In this paper, we introduce Aria-UI, a large multimodal model specifically designed for GUI grounding. Aria-UI adopts a pure-vision approach, eschewing reliance on auxiliary inputs. To adapt to heterogeneous planning instructions, we propose a scalable data pipeline that synthesizes diverse and high-quality instruction samples for grounding. To handle dynamic contexts in task performing, Aria-UI incorporates textual and text-image interleaved action histories, enabling robust context-aware reasoning for grounding. Aria-UI sets new state-of-the-art results across offline and online agent benchmarks, outperforming both vision-only and AXTree-reliant baselines. We release all training data and model checkpoints to foster further research at https://ariaui.github.io.††\faEnvelope yuhao-yang@outlook.com
items.zh: 通过直接操作图形用户界面（GUI）来自动化跨平台任务的数字智能体正变得越来越重要。对于这些智能体，从语言指令到目标元素的定位仍然是一个重大挑战，因为现有方法依赖于HTML或AXTree输入。在本文中，我们介绍了Aria-UI，一个专门为GUI定位设计的大型多模态模型。Aria-UI采用纯视觉方法，摒弃了对辅助输入的依赖。为了适应异构的规划指令，我们提出了一种可扩展的数据流水线，该流水线合成了多样且高质量的指令样本用于定位。为了处理任务执行中的动态上下文，Aria-UI整合了文本和文本-图像交错的动作历史，实现了稳健的上下文感知定位推理。Aria-UI在离线和在线智能体基准测试中均取得了新的最先进结果，优于纯视觉和依赖AXTree的基线方法。我们发布了所有训练数据和模型检查点，以促进进一步研究，网址为https://ariaui.github.io。††\faEnvelope yuhao-yang@outlook.com

items.capEn: Figure 2: The two-stage task performing process for general GUI agents. Aria-UI serves as a robust grounding model to make the planned actions truly happen.
items.capZh: 图2：通用GUI智能体的两阶段任务执行过程。Aria-UI作为一个稳健的定位模型，使规划的动作真正得以实现。

items.en: The rapid expansion of graphical user interfaces (GUIs) across web, desktop and mobile platforms has made them indispensable for digital interactions. From completing daily tasks like shopping or booking tickets to complex professional workflows, GUI agents play a critical role in automating these processes. As illustrated in Figure 2, a typical GUI agent operates in two stages: planning and grounding. In the planning stage, the agent generates action decisions to accomplish the user’s task based on the current screen state as its observation. In the grounding stage, the agent is tasked with locating and interacting with the target element as referred in the instructions provided by planning, thus make actions truly happen in the environment.
items.zh: 图形用户界面（GUI）在网页、桌面和移动平台上的快速扩展使其成为数字交互中不可或缺的一部分。从完成购物或订票等日常任务到复杂的工作流程，GUI智能体在自动化这些过程中扮演着关键角色。如图2所示，典型的GUI智能体分两个阶段运行：规划和定位。在规划阶段，智能体根据当前屏幕状态作为观察，生成动作决策以完成用户任务。在定位阶段，智能体需要定位并交互规划指令中提到的目标元素，从而使动作在环境中真正发生。

items.capEn: Figure 1: Performances of Aria-UI compared with previous SOTA methods.
items.capZh: 图1：Aria-UI与先前最先进方法的性能比较。

items.en: While efforts have been put to improve the planning of large multimodal models (LMMs) with CoT Yao et al. (2022b); Wei et al. (2022), and inference-time scaling Saha et al. (2024), effectively grounding GUI elements from language remains a significant challenge. The problem is compounded by the diverse visual layouts across diverse devices, wide variability in planned instructions, and the dynamic nature of task execution in real-world environments, all of which demand robust, adaptable, and efficient solutions.
items.zh: 尽管已有研究通过思维链（CoT）Yao et al. (2022b); Wei et al. (2022)和推理时扩展Saha et al. (2024)来改进大型多模态模型（LMM）的规划能力，但从语言指令中有效定位GUI元素仍然是一个重大挑战。问题因不同设备上多样的视觉布局、规划指令的广泛变异性以及真实环境中任务执行的动态性而变得更加复杂，所有这些都需要稳健、适应性强且高效的解决方案。

items.en: The basic grounding method involves leveraging HTML or accessibility trees (AXTress, or A11y) to identify the target element. However, feeding long textual contexts of the tree often leads to inefficiencies, hallucination, and biases due to missing information in the tree. The absence of visual input further limits the method’s ability to address instructions requiring visual or positional cues. Set-of-Mark Yang et al. (2023) combines visual and tree tag information. However, its reliance on HTML or AXTrees limits flexibility in diverse environments, as platform standards are inconsistent and, particularly on mobile and desktop, the quality of AXTrees depend largely on app developers’ implementation. Additionally, LMMs struggle to accurately select from numerous tags in images, constraining grounding performance Xie et al. (2024). To this end, building a pure-vision solution for GUI agent grounding is crucial.
items.zh: 基本的定位方法涉及利用HTML或无障碍树（AXTree，或A11y）来识别目标元素。然而，输入树的长文本上下文常常导致效率低下、幻觉以及因树中信息缺失而产生的偏差。缺乏视觉输入进一步限制了该方法处理需要视觉或位置线索的指令的能力。Set-of-Mark Yang et al. (2023)结合了视觉和树标签信息。然而，其对HTML或AXTree的依赖限制了在不同环境中的灵活性，因为平台标准不一致，特别是在移动和桌面平台上，AXTree的质量很大程度上取决于应用开发者的实现。此外，LMM难以准确选择图像中的众多标签，限制了定位性能Xie et al. (2024)。因此，构建一个纯视觉的GUI智能体定位解决方案至关重要。

items.en: Training an LMM for GUI instruction grounding is non-trivial. Existing LMMs are: 1) heavily skewed towards natural images due to data biases. 2) rarely trained for grounding. While some models are trained with datasets like RefCOCO Kazemzadeh et al. (2014), these datasets are not aligned with GUI scenarios and are sparsely populated. Recently, some studies Cheng et al. (2024); Gou et al. (2024) have leveraged LMMs’ powerful vision and language capabilities, using public mobile- or web-sourced data as (GUI image, instruction, coordinates) tuples to train LMMs as grounding models. Despite their effectiveness, we identify two key limitations in these approaches: (1) They overly depend on rigid instruction sources and formats, mainly HTML or AXTree-based textual elements. This lack of diversity hinders their robustness in adapting to the flexible and heterogeneous instructions generated by task planners. (2) They overlook the dynamic contextual information during task performing, such as the action history, which can provide valuable references for more accurate element grounding.
items.zh: 训练一个用于GUI指令定位的LMM并非易事。现有的LMM：1）由于数据偏差，严重偏向自然图像；2）很少针对定位进行训练。虽然一些模型使用RefCOCO Kazemzadeh et al. (2014)等数据集进行训练，但这些数据集与GUI场景不一致且样本稀疏。最近，一些研究Cheng et al. (2024); Gou et al. (2024)利用LMM强大的视觉和语言能力，使用公开的移动或网络来源数据作为（GUI图像，指令，坐标）元组来训练LMM作为定位模型。尽管这些方法有效，但我们发现了两个关键局限性：（1）它们过度依赖僵化的指令来源和格式，主要是基于HTML或AXTree的文本元素。这种多样性的缺乏阻碍了它们在适应任务规划器生成的灵活且异构的指令时的稳健性。（2）它们忽略了任务执行过程中的动态上下文信息，例如动作历史，这些信息可以为更准确的元素定位提供有价值的参考。

items.en: In this paper, we introduce Aria-UI, a robust LMM designed specifically for GUI grounding. Aria-UI is built upon Aria Li et al. (2024a), the state-of-the-art multimodal MoE model with 3.9B activated parameters. Aria-UI adopts a pure-vision approach, avoiding reliance on AXTree-like inputs while achieving superior grounding accuracy across diverse tasks and platforms.
items.zh: 在本文中，我们介绍了Aria-UI，一个专门为GUI定位设计的稳健LMM。Aria-UI基于Aria Li et al. (2024a)构建，后者是拥有39亿激活参数的最先进多模态MoE模型。Aria-UI采用纯视觉方法，避免依赖类似AXTree的输入，同时在跨不同任务和平台中实现了卓越的定位精度。

items.en: By addressing the core limitations of existing methods, we propose two key contributions in Aria-UI. For the challenge of rigid instructions, we design a large-scale, diverse data synthesis pipeline from our Common Crawl collection and public available data. This pipeline first leverages strong LMMs to generate detailed and accurate element captions and then utilizes an LLM to create diverse, human-like instructions that align with potential interactions based on these captions. We further incorporate the high-quality captions as additional supervision during training, enabling the model to better associate diverse instructions with their corresponding elements. For the challenge of ignoring dynamic contexts, we further leverage textual or text-image interleaved action history from trajectory data for training. This equips Aria-UI with robust grounding capabilities, enabling it to perform effectively in dynamic, multi-step real-world task scenarios.
items.zh: 通过解决现有方法的核心局限性，我们在Aria-UI中提出了两个关键贡献。针对僵化指令的挑战，我们设计了一个大规模、多样化的数据合成流水线，基于我们的Common Crawl集合和公开可用数据。该流水线首先利用强大的LMM生成详细且准确的元素描述，然后利用LLM基于这些描述创建多样化的、类似人类的指令，这些指令与潜在交互对齐。我们进一步将高质量描述作为训练中的额外监督，使模型能够更好地将多样化指令与其对应元素关联起来。针对忽略动态上下文的挑战，我们进一步利用轨迹数据中的文本或文本-图像交错动作历史进行训练。这赋予了Aria-UI稳健的定位能力，使其能够在动态、多步的真实任务场景中有效执行。

items.en: We propose a novel approach to address the challenge of rigid instructions with a scalable, data-centric pipeline. It generates high-quality and diverse (element caption, instruction) samples from Common Crawl and publicly available data, enabling Aria-UI to generalize effectively across diverse instructions in different environments.
items.zh: 我们提出了一种新颖的方法，通过可扩展的、以数据为中心的流水线来解决僵化指令的挑战。该方法从Common Crawl和公开可用数据中生成高质量且多样化的（元素描述，指令）样本，使Aria-UI能够在不同环境中的多样化指令下有效泛化。

items.en: Aria-UI introduces innovative designs for incorporating dynamic action history in textual or interleaved text-image formats. The improvements allow Aria-UI to ground elements more effectively in dynamic, multi-step task scenarios, especially under zero-shot settings.
items.zh: Aria-UI引入了创新设计，以文本或交错文本-图像格式整合动态动作历史。这些改进使Aria-UI能够在动态、多步任务场景中更有效地定位元素，尤其是在零样本设置下。

items.en: We conduct comprehensive evaluations on extensive benchmarks including both offline and online agent tasks, showcasing Aria-UI’s state-of-the-art performance. Notably, Aria-UI achieves higher grounding accuracy and task success rates compared to both vision-only and AXTree-reliant baselines.
items.zh: 我们在广泛的基准测试上进行了全面评估，包括离线和在线智能体任务，展示了Aria-UI的最先进性能。值得注意的是，与纯视觉和依赖AXTree的基线方法相比，Aria-UI实现了更高的定位精度和任务成功率。

items.capEn: Figure 3: The overall data and training pipeline for Aria-UI.
items.capZh: 图3：Aria-UI的整体数据和训练流水线。

items.en: Aria-UI is designed to seamlessly integrate into the latest general-purpose multimodal GUI agent framework Zheng et al. (2024); Xie et al. (2024); Koh et al. (2024); Rawles et al. (2024a), serving as a robust grounding model. We outline a solution to the challenges from a scalable, data-centric approach, as shown in Figure 3. In Section 2.1.1, we detail the synthesizing of diverse grounding data. Section 2.1.2 discusses building grounding samples with task context for dynamic scenarios, and Section 2.2 explains Aria-UI ’s training details.
items.zh: Aria-UI旨在无缝集成到最新的通用多模态GUI智能体框架Zheng et al. (2024); Xie et al. (2024); Koh et al. (2024); Rawles et al. (2024a)中，作为一个稳健的定位模型。我们通过可扩展的、以数据为中心的方法概述了这些挑战的解决方案，如图3所示。在第2.1.1节中，我们详细介绍了多样化定位数据的合成。第2.1.2节讨论了为动态场景构建带有任务上下文的定位样本，第2.2节解释了Aria-UI的训练细节。

full.secZh: 2.1 大规模多样化GUI数据合成

items.en: As summarized in Table 1, several existing methods have collected diverse corpus for GUI grounding. However, these corpora fail to effectively address GUI grounding for LMMs. They are either not open-source, too small, or lack coverage of all the major platforms. Moreover, they rely on rigid instruction sources and formats, from HTML extraction or specifically formatted referring caption. Additionally, they overlook the importance of the contextual information for grounding during dynamic task performing. We present how to solve these challenges by a data-centric approach with diverse data scaling from multiple platforms and context-aware data extension with trajectories.
items.zh: 如表1总结，已有几种方法收集了多样化的GUI定位语料库。然而，这些语料库未能有效解决LMM的GUI定位问题。它们要么不是开源的，要么规模太小，要么缺乏对所有主要平台的覆盖。此外，它们依赖僵化的指令来源和格式，来自HTML提取或特定格式的引用描述。此外，它们忽略了动态任务执行中上下文信息对定位的重要性。我们通过以数据为中心的方法，结合来自多个平台的多样化数据扩展和带有轨迹的上下文感知数据扩展，展示了如何解决这些挑战。

items.en: We propose a two-stage pipeline to transform raw samples into high-quality and diverse element instructions for grounding training. At the first stage, we utilize a strong LMM (GPT-4o or Qwen2-VL-72B Wang et al. (2024a)) that takes element screenshots and text extracted from HTML as input for accurate and detailed element descriptions. To enhance accuracy and reduce hallucination, the model perceives two screenshots: (1) an isolated image of the element and (2) a zoomed-in view, where the element is highlighted with a red bounding box. Additionally, the HTML text and the screen position of the element are provided for reference. The model is then prompted to generate a detailed caption of the element, including its visual properties, functionality, positional relationships, and any other distinctive attributes. In the second stage, we utilize an LLM to generate natural language instructions that correspond to potential interactions with the elements, based on their detailed captions. For instance, for the caption "The "subscribe" button, colored in bright red with white text and a bell icon, is positioned in the upper-right section of ChefMaria’s cooking channel header, showing "2.3M" subscribers” underneath," the synthesized instruction could be "subscribe to ChefMaria’s channel." To ensure diversity and expand the data volume, we produce three instructions for each element.
items.zh: 我们提出了一个两阶段流水线，将原始样本转换为高质量且多样化的元素指令，用于定位训练。在第一阶段，我们利用强大的LMM（GPT-4o或Qwen2-VL-72B Wang et al. (2024a)），该模型以元素截图和从HTML提取的文本作为输入，生成准确且详细的元素描述。为了提高准确性并减少幻觉，模型感知两种截图：（1）元素的孤立图像和（2）放大视图，其中元素用红色边界框高亮显示。此外，还提供HTML文本和元素的屏幕位置作为参考。然后提示模型生成元素的详细描述，包括其视觉属性、功能、位置关系以及任何其他显著特征。在第二阶段，我们利用LLM基于元素的详细描述生成与元素潜在交互对应的自然语言指令。例如，对于描述“'订阅'按钮，亮红色背景，白色文字，带有铃铛图标，位于ChefMaria烹饪频道标题的右上部分，下方显示'2.3M'订阅者”，合成的指令可能是“订阅ChefMaria的频道”。为了确保多样性并扩大数据量，我们为每个元素生成三条指令。

items.en: We apply our pipeline to three key GUI environments: web, desktop, and mobile, each with distinct challenges and characteristics.
items.zh: 我们将流水线应用于三个关键的GUI环境：网页、桌面和移动，每个环境都有不同的挑战和特点。

items.en: Web. Web data, with its diversity and dynamic rendering, is ideal for expanding GUI grounding datasets with varied element samples in size, type, and resolution. We leverage the latest collection of Common Crawl for data collection. We build a rigorous data curation and filtering pipeline to produce high-quality samples. We first filter out harmful webpages using fastText Bojanowski et al. (2017). Subsequently, we identify and select interactive elements by checking the HTML attributes. Considering that LMMs have acquired fundamental OCR skills during pretraining, we prioritize graphical elements over text-based elements. To reflect real-world grounding tasks in complex, element-rich environments, we heuristically retain webpages containing more than 20 valid elements. We use Playwright to render these webpages at 1920×\times1080 and 2440×\times1600 resolutions to accommodate common resolution requirements. We gather a diverse set of 173K webpages containing 2M elements through the procedure. With the data pipeline, we build detailed caption and instructions for each element, and result in 6M high-quality and diverse instruction samples in total.
items.zh: 网页。网页数据具有多样性和动态渲染的特点，非常适合通过不同大小、类型和分辨率的元素样本来扩展GUI定位数据集。我们利用最新的Common Crawl集合进行数据收集。我们构建了严格的数据整理和过滤流水线，以生成高质量样本。我们首先使用fastText Bojanowski et al. (2017)过滤掉有害网页。随后，通过检查HTML属性来识别和选择交互式元素。考虑到LMM在预训练期间已获得基本的OCR技能，我们优先考虑图形元素而非基于文本的元素。为了反映复杂、元素丰富的环境中的真实定位任务，我们启发式地保留包含超过20个有效元素的网页。我们使用Playwright以1920×1080和2440×1600的分辨率渲染这些网页，以适应常见的分辨率要求。通过该过程，我们收集了173K个网页，包含2M个元素。利用数据流水线，我们为每个元素构建了详细的描述和指令，总共产生了6M个高质量且多样化的指令样本。

items.en: Desktop. Since desktop environment is less scalable and human annotation costs high, desktop data has remained scarce. OmniACT Kapoor et al. (2024) manually annotated 7.3K instruction-grounding pairs. However, creating an automated data scaling pipeline for desktop remains a challenge. To mitigate the research gap, we develop a traverse agent powered by an LMM to explore the OS environment for data collecting. We build the traverse agent on OSWorld Xie et al. (2024) with Gemini 1.5 Flash. Leveraging the accessibility tree, the agent selects the next element to click in each screen state, aiming to reach previously unexplored screens. We equip the agent with a simple memory mechanism and guide its exploration through a heuristic depth-first search. We collect all screenshots and the corresponding A11y to parse all elements. Using this automated pipeline, we collected 15K elements tailored for desktop environment. We then utilize the data pipeline to extend the samples to 45K by generating diverse instructions.
items.zh: 桌面。由于桌面环境的可扩展性较差且人工标注成本高，桌面数据一直稀缺。OmniACT Kapoor et al. (2024)手动标注了7.3K个指令-定位对。然而，为桌面创建自动化的数据扩展流水线仍然是一个挑战。为了弥补这一研究空白，我们开发了一个由LMM驱动的遍历智能体，用于探索操作系统环境以收集数据。我们在OSWorld Xie et al. (2024)上使用Gemini 1.5 Flash构建了遍历智能体。利用无障碍树，智能体在每个屏幕状态下选择下一个要点击的元素，旨在到达之前未探索的屏幕。我们为智能体配备了简单的记忆机制，并通过启发式深度优先搜索引导其探索。我们收集所有截图和相应的A11y以解析所有元素。使用此自动化流水线，我们收集了15K个针对桌面环境的元素。然后利用数据流水线通过生成多样化指令将样本扩展到45K。

items.en: Mobile. Since automated GUI agents for mobile environments were explored earlier, a substantial amount of open-source data has been accumulated for mobile environment. Currently, the largest-scale grounding dataset for mobile is AMEX Chai et al. (2024), which provides 104K screenshots and 1.6M elements. While AMEX provides a large-scale dataset, it has only 712K elements with basic textual descriptions extracted from accessibility tags, and merely 3K elements are paired with human-like instructions. To address this gap, we regenerate high-quality caption and instruction samples with the data pipeline for AMEX, improving the training effectiveness while maintaining the same data volume.
items.zh: 移动。由于移动环境的自动化GUI智能体较早被探索，因此已经积累了大量的开源数据。目前，移动环境中规模最大的定位数据集是AMEX Chai et al. (2024)，它提供了104K张截图和1.6M个元素。虽然AMEX提供了大规模数据集，但只有712K个元素具有从无障碍标签提取的基本文本描述，且仅有3K个元素配有人类指令。为了解决这一差距，我们使用数据流水线为AMEX重新生成了高质量的描述和指令样本，在保持相同数据量的同时提高了训练效果。

items.en: Public Data. To further expand our grounding corpus and introduce more diverse sources for GUI images and instructions, we incorporate the following public datasets: 3M Web and 273K mobile elements from SeeClick training data Cheng et al. (2024); Li et al. (2020b, a), 15K mobile elements from Bai et al. (2021), 748k Web elements from GUICourse Chen et al. (2024), 131K desktop elements from OmniAct Kapoor et al. (2024), and 693K Web and mobile elements from AutoGUI 111https://huggingface.co/AutoGUI.
items.zh: 公共数据。为了进一步扩展我们的基础语料库，并为GUI图像和指令引入更多样化的来源，我们整合了以下公共数据集：来自SeeClick训练数据的300万网页和27.3万移动元素（Cheng等人，2024；Li等人，2020b，a），来自Bai等人（2021）的1.5万移动元素，来自GUICourse（Chen等人，2024）的74.8万网页元素，来自OmniAct（Kapoor等人，2024）的13.1万桌面元素，以及来自AutoGUI¹的69.3万网页和移动元素。

items.en: Accurately and efficiently performing grounding tasks within the dynamic context of real-world environments is a crucial capability for GUI agents. Despite its importance, existing approaches largely focus on grounding tasks under a single-step setting, where LMMs are trained to infer grounding results based only on the current state and instruction. Such approaches overlook the dynamic nature of GUI grounding and the critical role of context in real-world scenarios. For example, after executing a TYPE action, the next grounding step is likely associated with an ENTER or SUBMIT button. Similarly, in multi-step tasks that involve navigating through a multi-layered menu to locate a target entry, there is a strong contextual relationship between consecutive grounding actions. Leveraging such contextual information enriches the grounding context and aids the model in avoiding bias, thereby enhancing grounding performance.
items.zh: 在真实环境的动态上下文中准确高效地执行定位任务是GUI智能体的关键能力。尽管其重要性，现有方法主要关注单步设置下的定位任务，即LMM被训练为仅基于当前状态和指令推断定位结果。这类方法忽略了GUI定位的动态性质以及上下文在真实场景中的关键作用。例如，在执行TYPE操作后，下一步定位很可能与ENTER或SUBMIT按钮相关。类似地，在涉及通过多层菜单导航以定位目标条目的多步任务中，连续定位操作之间存在强烈的上下文关系。利用这种上下文信息可以丰富定位上下文，帮助模型避免偏差，从而提升定位性能。

items.en: We utilize publicly available agent trajectories to simulate grounding tasks with contexts. We focus on constructing two types of contextual setups: (1) textual action history and (2) text-image-interleaved history. The text-based setup incorporates the ultimate task along with prior action histories, and the text-image-interleaved setup extends this by including NN historical screen state images, providing richer contextual cues and training the model to understand multimodal interaction history. Notably, most trajectory data only includes basic sequential information, such as the click coordinates, thus lacks comprehensive stepwise instruction semantics. To address this, we augment all grounding steps within the trajectory data using the proposed data pipeline to generate detailed stepwise instructions. For non-grounding actions, we encode instructions (e.g., SWIPE and TYPE) using rule-based methods for natural language formats. For the interleaved setting, we collect data as per N=[1,2,3]N=[1,2,3], and for the text-based setting, we input all historical actions in text. Finally we collect 992K samples with the trajectories from GUI-Odyssey Lu et al. (2024), Android in the Zoo Zhang et al. (2024d), Android Control Li et al. (2024b), Android in the Wild Rawles et al. (2024b) and AMEX Chai et al. (2024).
items.zh: 我们利用公开的智能体轨迹来模拟带上下文的定位任务。我们专注于构建两种类型的上下文设置：（1）文本动作历史；（2）文本-图像交错历史。基于文本的设置包含最终任务以及先前的动作历史，而文本-图像交错设置则通过包含N个历史屏幕状态图像来扩展，提供更丰富的上下文线索，并训练模型理解多模态交互历史。值得注意的是，大多数轨迹数据仅包含基本的序列信息，例如点击坐标，因此缺乏全面的逐步指令语义。为了解决这个问题，我们使用所提出的数据流水线增强轨迹数据中的所有定位步骤，以生成详细的逐步指令。对于非定位动作，我们使用基于规则的方法将指令（例如SWIPE和TYPE）编码为自然语言格式。对于交错设置，我们按N=[1,2,3]收集数据；对于基于文本的设置，我们以文本形式输入所有历史动作。最后，我们从GUI-Odyssey（Lu等人，2024）、Android in the Zoo（Zhang等人，2024d）、Android Control（Li等人，2024b）、Android in the Wild（Rawles等人，2024b）和AMEX（Chai等人，2024）的轨迹中收集了99.2万个样本。

items.en: We build Aria-UI with the state-of-the-art multimodal MoE model, Aria Li et al. (2024a). We leverage two strengths from Aria for GUI agents: 1) Aria is multimodal-native, built for better understanding of complex and interleaved contexts; 2) with only 3.9B activated parameters, Aria shows even faster inference speed than 7B dense models.
items.zh: 我们使用最先进的多模态MoE模型Aria（Li等人，2024a）构建Aria-UI。我们利用Aria的两个优势用于GUI智能体：1）Aria是多模态原生模型，专为更好地理解复杂和交错上下文而构建；2）仅需3.9B激活参数，Aria的推理速度甚至比7B密集模型更快。

items.en: With the shift from 1080p to 2K resolutions on computers and mobile devices, training grounding LMMs at high resolutions has become essential. Aria originally supports high-resolution images up to 980×980, which we extend to a maximum of 3920×2940 on Aria-UI by splitting the image into smaller blocks, significantly increasing the range of image sizes to handle. To maintain positional accuracy, we take inspiration from NaViT Dehghani et al. (2024) to place padding before resizing for keeping the original screenshot ratio.
items.zh: 随着计算机和移动设备从1080p分辨率转向2K分辨率，训练高分辨率下的定位LMM变得至关重要。Aria最初支持高达980×980的高分辨率图像，我们通过将图像分割成更小的块，将其扩展到Aria-UI上的最大3920×2940，显著增加了可处理的图像尺寸范围。为了保持位置精度，我们借鉴NaViT（Dehghani等人，2024）的方法，在调整大小之前进行填充，以保持原始截图的宽高比。

items.en: We train Aria-UI following a two-phase procedure. We first leverage all the single-step grounding data to train the foundation GUI grounding capability of Aria-UI. Specifically, Aria-UI is tasked with generating grounding answers given the prompt "Given a GUI image, what are the relative (0-1000) pixel point coordinates for the element corresponding to the following instruction or description: […]". We follow Gou et al. (2024) to group all the samples for the same GUI image into a multi-turn conversation format. Then, context-aware data with both text-based and text-and-image-interleaved history settings are fed into the model to further enhance the grounding capability under the dynamic setting. For this phase, we add extra 20% samples from the single-step data to keep the generic grounding capability and avoid over-fitting.
items.zh: 我们按照两阶段流程训练Aria-UI。首先，我们利用所有单步定位数据来训练Aria-UI的基础GUI定位能力。具体来说，Aria-UI的任务是根据提示“给定一张GUI图像，与以下指令或描述对应的元素的相对（0-1000）像素点坐标是什么：[…]”生成定位答案。我们遵循Gou等人（2024）的方法，将同一GUI图像的所有样本分组为多轮对话格式。然后，将基于文本和文本-图像交错历史设置的上下文感知数据输入模型，以进一步增强动态设置下的定位能力。在此阶段，我们额外添加了20%的单步数据样本，以保持通用定位能力并避免过拟合。

items.en: During inference, Aria-UI outputs the grounded pixels coordinates normalized to [0,1000][0,1000]. Since Aria-UI is also trained with context-aware trajectories, it can take historical agent actions and grounding actions as chat history, formulating a stronger grounding system in dynamic environments.
items.zh: 在推理过程中，Aria-UI输出归一化到[0,1000]的定位像素坐标。由于Aria-UI还使用上下文感知轨迹进行训练，它可以将历史智能体动作和定位动作作为聊天历史，从而在动态环境中构建更强的定位系统。

items.en: We testify the performances of Aria-UI via extensive experiments including single-step grounding, grounding under offline agent trajectories and grounding in dynamic online agent environments.
items.zh: 我们通过大量实验验证Aria-UI的性能，包括单步定位、离线智能体轨迹下的定位以及动态在线智能体环境中的定位。

items.en: We first examine Aria-UI’s foundational GUI grounding capabilities on ScreenSpot Cheng et al. (2024). The benchmark compasses six subsets spanning over two types of elements and three major platforms. Each test entry provides a unique GUI image and a human-annotated instruction for locating a specific element. The typical resolution for mobile and web subsets is 2k, and for desktop samples it is 540p. We include the state-of-the-art UGround Gou et al. (2024), with previous grounding models SeeClick Cheng et al. (2024) and CogAgent Hong et al. (2024) as baselines. We also include generic LMMs – GPT-4, GPT-4o and Qwen2-VL Wang et al. (2024a).
items.zh: 我们首先在ScreenSpot（Cheng等人，2024）上检验Aria-UI的基础GUI定位能力。该基准测试涵盖六个子集，跨越两种元素类型和三个主要平台。每个测试条目提供一张独特的GUI图像和一条人工标注的指令，用于定位特定元素。移动和网页子集的典型分辨率为2k，桌面样本为540p。我们包括最先进的UGround（Gou等人，2024），以及之前的定位模型SeeClick（Cheng等人，2024）和CogAgent（Hong等人，2024）作为基线。我们还包括通用LMM——GPT-4、GPT-4o和Qwen2-VL（Wang等人，2024a）。

items.en: From the results in Table 2, Aria-UI achieves the highest average accuracy (82.4%) across all subsets, demonstrating its superior grounding performance. Aria-UI achieves a significant margin over the state-of-the-art UGround, particularly excelling in tasks for textual elements. The results showcase Aria-UI’s robustness and generalizability across diverse platforms and element types.
items.zh: 从表2的结果来看，Aria-UI在所有子集上取得了最高平均准确率（82.4%），展示了其卓越的定位性能。Aria-UI相对于最先进的UGround取得了显著优势，特别是在文本元素任务中表现出色。结果展示了Aria-UI在不同平台和元素类型上的鲁棒性和泛化能力。

items.en: Mobile Agents. We further testify how Aria-UI performs under an offline dynamic setting, where the model is required to provide grounding coordinates in agent task trajectories. We employ AndroidControl-Low Li et al. (2024b), GUI-Odyssey Lu et al. (2024) and AndroidControl-High, the first two has human-annotated or generated stepwise instruction, while the last one only provides the user task, and needs an additional planner for stepwise instructions. We follow Li et al. (2024b); Gou et al. (2024) to utilize GPT-4o as the planner. We report element accuracy and the task success rate in Table 3. Specifically, we evaluate Aria-UI and the baselines on both zero-shot and training split-included settings. As we evaluate Aria-UI with agent trajectories, we extend the model with two variants: Aria-UITH and Aria-UIIH, for textual action history input and text-image interleaved history input, separately. We choose N=1N=1 for Aria-UIIH to include additional one GUI image from history during inference.
items.zh: 移动智能体。我们进一步测试Aria-UI在离线动态设置下的表现，其中模型需要在智能体任务轨迹中提供定位坐标。我们使用AndroidControl-Low（Li等人，2024b）、GUI-Odyssey（Lu等人，2024）和AndroidControl-High，前两个具有人工标注或生成的逐步指令，而最后一个仅提供用户任务，需要额外的规划器来生成逐步指令。我们遵循Li等人（2024b）和Gou等人（2024）的方法，使用GPT-4o作为规划器。我们在表3中报告元素准确率和任务成功率。具体来说，我们在零样本和包含训练分割的设置下评估Aria-UI和基线。由于我们使用智能体轨迹评估Aria-UI，我们扩展了模型的两种变体：Aria-UITH和Aria-UIIH，分别用于文本动作历史输入和文本-图像交错历史输入。对于Aria-UIIH，我们选择N=1以在推理时包含一张历史GUI图像。

items.en: The results demonstrate the superior performance of Aria-UI across different evaluation settings and metrics. Specifically, Aria-UI and its variants consistently outperform existing baselines, with Aria-UITH achieving peak performance of grounding accuracy and task success rate on AndroidControl, and Aria-UIIH achieving the best performances on GUI-Odyssey. Empirically, we found that the incorporation of historical actions, whether in text-only (T​H{TH}) or text-image interleaved (I​H{IH}) format, provides crucial context for accurate element grounding and task completion. In particular, we observe that the textual action history (Aria-UITH) strikes an effective balance between efficiency and performance compared to both the base model and Aria-UIIH.
items.zh: 结果展示了Aria-UI在不同评估设置和指标上的优越性能。具体来说，Aria-UI及其变体持续优于现有基线，其中Aria-UITH在AndroidControl上取得了定位准确率和任务成功率的峰值，而Aria-UIIH在GUI-Odyssey上取得了最佳性能。根据经验，我们发现历史动作的整合，无论是纯文本（TH）还是文本-图像交错（IH）格式，都为准确的元素定位和任务完成提供了关键上下文。特别地，我们观察到文本动作历史（Aria-UITH）在效率和性能之间取得了有效平衡，优于基础模型和Aria-UIIH。

items.en: In summary, the significant performance gap between Aria-UI and existing approaches like SeeClick and UGround underscores the effectiveness of our proposed model in understanding and executing mobile interface interactions.
items.zh: 总之，Aria-UI与现有方法（如SeeClick和UGround）之间的显著性能差距，凸显了我们提出的模型在理解和执行移动界面交互方面的有效性。

items.en: Web Agents. We evaluate how Aria-UI and its variants perform on multimodal Web agent tasks with the Multimodal-Mind2Web Deng et al. (2024) benchmark. The original training split is not included by Aria-UI and the baselines during the training stage, thus we form a fully zero-shot out-of-distribution scenario. Three subsets, cross-task, cross-website and cross-domain are employed for a comprehensive evaluation.
items.zh: 网页智能体。我们使用Multimodal-Mind2Web（Deng等人，2024）基准测试评估Aria-UI及其变体在多模态网页智能体任务上的表现。Aria-UI和基线在训练阶段未包含原始训练分割，因此我们构建了一个完全零样本的分布外场景。使用三个子集：跨任务、跨网站和跨领域，进行综合评估。

items.en: Shown in Table 4, Aria-UI and its variants significantly outperform all baselines across the three subsets, achieving an average accuracy of 57.5% for the base model and 58.9% for Aria-UITH and Aria-UIIH. Notably, Aria-UIIH demonstrates the strongest performance in the cross-website and cross-domain subsets, showcasing its robust ability to leverage historical multimodal context. The improvements over previous models, including UGround and SeeClick, underscore Aria-UI’s effectiveness in handling zero-shot grounding tasks on diverse and unseen web interfaces.
items.zh: 如表4所示，Aria-UI及其变体在三个子集上显著优于所有基线，基础模型平均准确率为57.5%，Aria-UITH和Aria-UIIH为58.9%。值得注意的是，Aria-UIIH在跨网站和跨领域子集上表现最强，展示了其利用历史多模态上下文的强大能力。相对于之前模型（包括UGround和SeeClick）的改进，凸显了Aria-UI在处理多样且未见过的网页界面上的零样本定位任务中的有效性。

items.en: Mobile and Web. We use AndroidWorld Rawles et al. (2024a) for online mobile agent evaluation in an Android emulator environment. The evaluation is fully based on success of the task by checking the system state of the virtual device. We also include the MobileMiniWob++ task collection provided by AndroidWorld, which adpats the Web agent environment MiniWob++ Liu et al. (2018) to AndroidEnv Toyama et al. (2021), the same environment as AndroidWorld. We evalute Aria-UI with the strongest baseline, UGround under the same M3A agent framework, compared with SoM and Choice methods that require AXTree input. We report task success rate, the most important metric for real agents in Table 5. Our observations are:
items.zh: 移动和网页。我们使用AndroidWorld（Rawles等人，2024a）在Android模拟器环境中进行在线移动智能体评估。评估完全基于通过检查虚拟设备系统状态的任务成功。我们还包含了AndroidWorld提供的MobileMiniWob++任务集合，该集合将Web智能体环境MiniWob++（Liu等人，2018）适配到AndroidEnv（Toyama等人，2021），与AndroidWorld相同的环境。我们在相同的M3A智能体框架下，将Aria-UI与最强基线UGround进行比较，并与需要AXTree输入的SoM和Choice方法对比。我们在表5中报告任务成功率，这是真实智能体最重要的指标。我们的观察如下：

items.en: In AndroidWorld, our approach achieves the best performance to date, with a task success rate of 44.8%, achieved by Aria-UITH. This surpasses the previous state-of-the-art method, UGround, as well as non-pure vision methods such as SoM and Choice, which rely heavily on AXTree input. The results highlight Aria-UI’s superior ability to handle diverse element instructions in real-world settings, demonstrating its robustness and adaptability for pure-vision GUI agents.
items.zh: 在AndroidWorld中，我们的方法取得了迄今为止最佳性能，Aria-UITH的任务成功率为44.8%。这超越了之前最先进的方法UGround，以及严重依赖AXTree输入的非纯视觉方法（如SoM和Choice）。结果凸显了Aria-UI在真实环境中处理多样化元素指令的卓越能力，展示了其作为纯视觉GUI智能体的鲁棒性和适应性。

items.en: On MobileMiniWob++, Aria-UI outperforms UGround, and choice-based methods. Due to the simplicity of MiniWob++ layouts, GPT-4-Turbo with SoM achieves the highest performance. However, Aria-UI still demonstrates the highest scores with pure-vision input.
items.zh: 在MobileMiniWob++上，Aria-UI优于UGround和基于选择的方法。由于MiniWob++布局简单，使用SoM的GPT-4-Turbo取得了最高性能。然而，Aria-UI在纯视觉输入下仍然展示了最高分数。

items.en: OSWorld. We further evaluate Aria-UI on the most up-to-date and complex computer use simulator benchmark, OSWorld Xie et al. (2024). Following the pure-vision agent framework in OSWorld, we place Aria-UI as the grounding model to work collaboratively with GPT-4o on the 369 real tasks provided. We compared Aria-UI with previous SOTA methods and summarize the task success rate in Table 6. With GPT-4o as planner and Aria-UITH as the grounding model, we achieve the highest average task success rate of 15.15%, outperforming previous methods across all computer-use scenarios in OSWorld. Notably, it excels in tasks like VLC (30.06%), Chrome (23.80%), and Impress (15.32%), highlighting Aria-UI’s strong performance in diverse, complex GUI tasks.
items.zh: OSWorld。我们进一步在最新且最复杂的计算机使用模拟器基准测试OSWorld（Xie等人，2024）上评估Aria-UI。遵循OSWorld中的纯视觉智能体框架，我们将Aria-UI作为定位模型，与GPT-4o协作处理提供的369个真实任务。我们将Aria-UI与之前的SOTA方法进行比较，并在表6中总结任务成功率。使用GPT-4o作为规划器，Aria-UITH作为定位模型，我们取得了15.15%的最高平均任务成功率，在OSWorld的所有计算机使用场景中优于之前的方法。值得注意的是，它在VLC（30.06%）、Chrome（23.80%）和Impress（15.32%）等任务中表现出色，凸显了Aria-UI在多样化复杂GUI任务中的强大性能。

items.en: We further testify how Aria-UI performs with ablation settings of the proposed components through the following perspectives:
items.zh: 我们进一步通过以下视角的消融设置测试Aria-UI的性能：

items.en: (-) Ultra Resolution. We remove the ultra resolution support for Aria-UI.
items.zh: (-) 超高分辨率。我们移除了 Aria-UI 的超高分辨率支持。

items.en: (+) Visual CoT Prompting. We use visual CoT prompting during test time for Aria-UI. For example: "Think step-by-step with visual clues before giving the answer."
items.zh: (+) 视觉思维链提示。我们在 Aria-UI 的测试阶段使用视觉思维链提示。例如：“在给出答案之前，逐步思考视觉线索。”

items.en: (-) Aria-UI Pipeline Data. We remove the data from our pipeline during training.
items.zh: (-) Aria-UI 流水线数据。我们在训练过程中移除了来自流水线的数据。

items.en: (-) Diversified Instruction. We directly use refer. caption as input and coordinates as output for training, removing the diversified instructions.
items.zh: (-) 多样化指令。我们直接使用参考描述作为输入，坐标作为输出进行训练，移除了多样化指令。

items.en: (-) Refer. as Supervision. We use only coordinates for supervision for our pipeline data.
items.zh: (-) 参考描述作为监督。我们仅使用坐标作为流水线数据的监督。

items.en: We summarize the ablation results in Table 7. The results highlight the critical role of ultra resolution (Avg. 61.1) and Aria-UI data, particularly for Icon/Widget grounding. Removing diversified instruction or refer. as supervision degrades performance across platforms, due to weak alignment between instruction, refer. caption and grounding coordinates. We also found that adding CoT improves text-based tasks on mobile but struggles with others, caused by noise in visual reasoning.
items.zh: 我们在表 7 中总结了消融实验结果。结果凸显了超高分辨率（平均 61.1）和 Aria-UI 数据的关键作用，尤其是在图标/小部件定位方面。移除多样化指令或参考描述作为监督会降低各平台的性能，原因是指令、参考描述和定位坐标之间的对齐较弱。我们还发现，添加思维链提升了移动设备上基于文本的任务，但在其他任务上表现不佳，这是由于视觉推理中的噪声所致。

items.en: Vision-language Grounding with Large Multimodal Models. Foundational approaches for vision-language grounding, such as Zou et al. (2023); Liu et al. (2023); Li et al. (2023), integrate CLIP with specialized vision models to tackle language-guided grounding tasks. To address the limitations in complex reasoning scenarios, researchers have begun leveraging LMMs Liu et al. (2024); Dai et al. (2023); Shao et al. (2024) as a promising direction. Notable works Peng et al. (2023); Pi et al. (2023); Wang et al. (2024b) train LMMs to respond to fine-grained language instructions by grounding them in specific visual regions, while general-purpose models Bai et al. (2023); Li et al. (2024a) incorporate grounding as a core function during training. Additionally, significant advances in spatial information processing Zhang et al. (2023b); Chen et al. (2023); Zhang et al. (2023c); You et al. (2023); Zhang et al. (2024b) have enhanced regional visual comprehension capabilities. Despite these advancements, these methods, while effective for natural images, face challenges when applied to GUI screenshots due to insufficient specialized training data.
items.zh: 基于大型多模态模型的视觉语言定位。视觉语言定位的基础方法，如 Zou 等人 (2023); Liu 等人 (2023); Li 等人 (2023)，将 CLIP 与专门的视觉模型相结合，以处理语言引导的定位任务。为了解决复杂推理场景中的局限性，研究人员开始利用大型多模态模型（LMMs）Liu 等人 (2024); Dai 等人 (2023); Shao 等人 (2024) 作为有前景的方向。值得注意的工作包括 Peng 等人 (2023); Pi 等人 (2023); Wang 等人 (2024b)，它们训练 LMMs 通过将细粒度语言指令定位到特定视觉区域来响应指令，而通用模型 Bai 等人 (2023); Li 等人 (2024a) 则将定位作为训练中的核心功能。此外，空间信息处理方面的重大进展 Zhang 等人 (2023b); Chen 等人 (2023); Zhang 等人 (2023c); You 等人 (2023); Zhang 等人 (2024b) 增强了区域视觉理解能力。尽管取得了这些进展，这些方法虽然对自然图像有效，但由于缺乏专门的训练数据，在应用于 GUI 截图时面临挑战。

items.en: General GUI Agents. Automating GUI operations with capable agents has become a trending research area that leverages LMMs. Existing efforts have been put to desgin autonomous agents for complex task completion on mobile Rawles et al. (2024a); Bai et al. (2024); Li et al. (2024c); Zhang et al. (2023a); Wen et al. (2024); Nong et al. (2024); You et al. (2024); Li et al. (2024d), Web Koh et al. (2024); Yao et al. (2022a); Zhou et al. (2023); Lai et al. (2024); He et al. (2024); Abuelsaad et al. (2024); Ma et al. (2023); Zhang et al. (2024c) and desktop Xie et al. (2024); Wu et al. (2024); Gao et al. (2023); Zheng et al. (2023); Zhang et al. (2024a); Niu et al. (2024) environments. These methods initially relied on HTML or AXTrees for element grounding to perform actions. Recently, several notable studies Cheng et al. (2024); Gou et al. (2024) have proposed developing pure vision-based GUI grounding models with LMMs. However, due to their lack of instruction diversity and insufficient consideration of dynamic context, these approaches have delivered sub-optimal performances.
items.zh: 通用 GUI 智能体。利用 LMMs 实现 GUI 操作自动化的智能体已成为一个热门研究领域。现有工作致力于设计自主智能体，用于在移动端 Rawles 等人 (2024a); Bai 等人 (2024); Li 等人 (2024c); Zhang 等人 (2023a); Wen 等人 (2024); Nong 等人 (2024); You 等人 (2024); Li 等人 (2024d)、网页端 Koh 等人 (2024); Yao 等人 (2022a); Zhou 等人 (2023); Lai 等人 (2024); He 等人 (2024); Abuelsaad 等人 (2024); Ma 等人 (2023); Zhang 等人 (2024c) 和桌面端 Xie 等人 (2024); Wu 等人 (2024); Gao 等人 (2023); Zheng 等人 (2023); Zhang 等人 (2024a); Niu 等人 (2024) 环境中完成复杂任务。这些方法最初依赖 HTML 或 AXTrees 进行元素定位以执行操作。最近，一些值得注意的研究 Cheng 等人 (2024); Gou 等人 (2024) 提出了使用 LMMs 开发纯视觉的 GUI 定位模型。然而，由于缺乏指令多样性和对动态上下文的考虑不足，这些方法表现欠佳。

items.en: In this paper, we introduced Aria-UI, a robust LMM for GUI grounding across diverse environments. We designed a two-stage data pipeline for high-quality and diverse GUI grounding data from multiple platforms. We further incorporated dynamic action history as effective cues for stronger grounding capabilities in real-world environments. As a scalable and data-centric method, Aria-UI outperforms existing methods on all evaluated benchmarks, with both offline and online agent tasks. The model demonstrates strong zero-shot generalization across platforms, establishing Aria-UI as a powerful solution for universal GUI grounding.
items.zh: 在本文中，我们介绍了 Aria-UI，一个用于跨不同环境进行 GUI 定位的鲁棒 LMM。我们设计了一个两阶段数据流水线，用于从多个平台获取高质量且多样化的 GUI 定位数据。我们进一步将动态动作历史作为有效线索，以增强在真实环境中的定位能力。作为一种可扩展且以数据为中心的方法，Aria-UI 在所有评估基准上均优于现有方法，包括离线与在线智能体任务。该模型展示了跨平台的强大零样本泛化能力，使 Aria-UI 成为通用 GUI 定位的强大解决方案。

items.en: While Aria-UI demonstrates strong performance in grounding target elements based on instructions provided by a planner, it currently lacks the ability to autonomously perform both planning and grounding for a given task. This reliance on the planner model introduces a dependency on the quality and effectiveness of the planner, which can affect overall performance for complex tasks. Additionally, Aria-UI ’s training does not yet incorporate error correction for planner-generated instructions, limiting its ability to correct mistakes made by the planner during dynamic tasks. Future work will focus on enabling Aria-UI to perform integrated planning and grounding, as well as enhancing its ability to handle and correct planner errors in real-time.
items.zh: 尽管 Aria-UI 在根据规划器提供的指令定位目标元素方面表现出色，但目前它缺乏自主执行给定任务的规划和定位能力。这种对规划器模型的依赖引入了对规划器质量和有效性的依赖，可能影响复杂任务的整体性能。此外，Aria-UI 的训练尚未包含对规划器生成指令的错误纠正，限制了其在动态任务中纠正规划器错误的能力。未来的工作将专注于使 Aria-UI 能够执行集成规划和定位，并增强其实时处理和纠正规划器错误的能力。
